title: Update application name to Mannosalva Clinic App

requirements.text: Update the application title in frontend/index.html to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' in the browser tab

quotes: Add name of app " mannosalva clinic app"

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the page title
The title tag in index.html reflects the new application name

requirements.text: Update the application branding in Layout.tsx header to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the main application name

quotes: Add name of app " mannosalva clinic app"

acceptanceCriteria: The header navigation displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' prominently
The branding is visible on all pages that use the Layout component

requirements.text: Update the login page branding in LoginPage.tsx to show 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the application name

quotes: Add name of app " mannosalva clinic app"

acceptanceCriteria: The login page displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' in the branded card
The application name is clearly visible before authentication

requirements.text: Update the footer branding in Layout.tsx to reference 'Mannosalva Clinic App' consistently

quotes: Add name of app " mannosalva clinic app"

acceptanceCriteria: The footer displays 'Mannosalva Clinic App' in the branding section

nonGoals: Changing the backend package name or canister configuration
